task: Launch-quality advanced task: Composite Wingbox Impact Damage Disposition Model. Reality context: a carbon-fiber wingbox panel has shipping-impact indications before static test. Embedded packet contains a metric map and four records. Compute normalized risk per record using the provided formula and classify each record as fail/warn/pass. For each record compute derived metrics, apply validation checks, mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review, identify the smallest defensible intervention (repair, re-inspection, or test-as-is) that meets the decision rules and budget, and write a decision rationale. Deliver a spreadsheet (wingbox_disposition.xlsx) containing all calculations, formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, and a final recommendation table; and a markdown decision memo (repair_memo.md) with rationale, sensitivity notes (including the provided sensitivity_shift_pct), and explicit references to the embedded packet. All calculations must use only the embedded packet; no external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions are allowed.
